title: Math Expression Evaluator
scenario: Write a short Python function that takes a string input representing a math expression and outputs the result. The function should handle inputs with varying numbers of operators and numbers.
constraints: Must use Python's built-in eval() function

evaluationCriteria.description: The generated code should be syntactically valid Python code
The generated code should adhere to the given constraints (lines of code, eval() function)
The generated code should correctly process the input and output the result of the math expression
